• HTML5 game with pixel art mining mechanics and multiplayer support
  • Procedurally generated underground maps with various ores and resources
  • Real-time multiplayer via MQTT broker with WebSocket connections
  • Upgrade system for drills, cargo, fuel capacity, and special abilities
  • Cloud save system using Puter storage for cross-device progress
    const TILE_TYPES = { EMPTY: 0, DIRT: 1, COAL: 6, IRON: 7, GOLD: 8, DIAMOND: 9, ...
    class GameEngine { update() { /* movement, mining, fuel consumption */ } draw() { /* render tiles */ } }

Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game where players dig through procedurally generated underground terrain to collect valuable resources. The game features real-time multiplayer gameplay through WebSocket connections, an upgrade system for mining equipment, and cloud-based save functionality. Players can trade resources, build structures, and explore a vast underground world filled with various ores and minerals.
